# Research Brief: Async Codec Adoption

## Context

Audio codec ecosystems have converged on async-first APIs over the last 18 months.

## Findings

> "AV1 reference encoder achieved real-time on commodity hardware in 2025." — [AOMedia release notes](https://aomedia.org/notes/2025)

## Sources

- https://aomedia.org/notes/2025
- https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc9000.txt
